name: ABL GROUP ASA
rationale: While ABL Group ASA operates an attractive asset-light consulting model within the vital energy transition and offshore sectors, the current Return on Equity (ROE) of 4.81% falls significantly short of the 15%+ threshold typically sought by value investors. The absence of a P/E ratio suggests erratic trailing earnings, which conflicts with the Buffett principle of predictable earnings growth. Management demonstrates integrity through disciplined M&A and a clear strategic pivot toward renewables; however, the competitive moat is built on human capital rather than a durable cost advantage or brand monopoly, making it vulnerable to wage inflation. While the low Price-to-Book (P/B) of 1.35 offers a margin of safety, a 10-fold increase would require a massive expansion in operating margins and market share that is not currently evident in the latest quarterly performance.
